sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Newport Beach, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: launch window and pricing patience. Primary keyword: Newport Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Newport Beach housing market; Newport Beach real estate market update; Newport Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Newport Beach; Newport Beach home selling market; Newport Beach homes for sale inventory; Newport Beach days on market; Newport Beach listing price; Newport Beach seller market; Newport Beach housing market 2026; Newport Beach market update sellers; Newport Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Newport Beach; is now a good time to sell in Newport Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
